markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jul 7, 2026 5 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 76.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 76.99° on Jul 7, 2026 at 5am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Rodrigo Pacheco Mendez wins the Pacheco Mendez vs Meligeni Alves professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Bogota Round Of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Pacheco Mendez vs Meligeni Alves professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Bogota Round Of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Rodrigo Pacheco Mendez win the Pacheco Mendez vs Meligeni Alves: Round Of 32 match?
